description_long: This house is a modern, flat-roofed residence set on a triangular plot with a sloped terrain, surrounded by tall, slender trees. The structure features a mix of dark stone and wood paneling on its exterior, with large rectangular windows providing ample natural light. The building is composed of multiple interconnected volumes, creating a dynamic and layered appearance. The front includes a paved driveway and a recessed entryway, while the rear and sides are bordered by dense tree coverage. The landscaping integrates the house with its natural surroundings, emphasizing privacy and a connection to nature. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with dark stone and wood paneling, set on a sloped, tree-lined triangular plot. Large windows and layered volumes create a sleek, minimalist appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, and the layered facade with both stone and wood finishes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wood-paneled section and the sloped terrain, with trees densely lining the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the house partially obscured by trees, emphasizing the integration with the natural landscape.
description_view_3: Back view dominated by tall trees, with the house mostly hidden, showcasing the secluded and private setting.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entryway with a paved approach, minimal overhang, and clean, geometric lines
